_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: I don't quite know where to start
expression: I don't quite know where to start

sentences.en: ★ I don't quite know where to start.
You see, I didn't realize until the other night that I'd met Gatsby. Five years ago. In Louisville.
sentences.ko: 실은 며칠 전 밤에야 알았어요 — 내가 개츠비를 만난 적이 있다는 걸. 5년 전, 루이빌에서요.
